title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Six Senses India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Six Senses India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Six Senses India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Six Senses India:
Six Senses India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
